title: Exotic tetraquark states with the $qq\bar{Q}\bar{Q}$ configuration
author_string: Si-Qiang Luo, Kan Chen, Xiang Liu, Yan-Rui Liu, Shi-Lin Zhu
abstract: In this work, we study systematically the mass splittings of the $qq\bar{Q}\bar{Q}$ ($q=u$, $d$, $s$ and $Q=c$, $b$) tetraquark states with the color-magnetic interaction by considering color mixing effects and estimate roughly their masses. We find that the color mixing effect is relatively important for the $J^P=0^+$ states and possible stable tetraquarks exist in the $nn\bar{Q}\bar{Q}$ ($n=u$, $d$) and $ns\bar{Q}\bar{Q}$ systems either with $J=0$ or with $J=1$. Possible decay patterns of the tetraquarks are briefly discussed.
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables. Accepted by EPJC
